using System;
using DesignPatterns.Behavioral;

[global::System.CodeDom.Compiler.GeneratedCode("DesignPatterns.SourceGenerators", "1.0")]
public static partial class GlobalEventHandlerRegistry
{
    public static global::DesignPatterns.Behavioral.IEventAggregator SubscribeAll(global::DesignPatterns.Behavioral.IEventAggregator aggregator)
    {
        aggregator.Subscribe<global::GlobalEvent>(new global::GlobalHandler());
        return aggregator;
    }
